questionHtml: Petroleum contains many hydrocarbons. Explain how these are separated by fractional distillation.
markschemeHtml:
Any three of:

different molar masses

OR

different strengths of intermolecular forces

 

different boiling points

temperature in «fractionating» column decreases upwards

 

«components» condense at different temperatures/heights

OR

«component with» lower boiling point leaves column first

 

[3 marks]

meta.title: Petroleum contains many hydrocarbons. Explain how these are separated by fractional distillation.
